creator: yvesguerin@yahoo.ca
text:
The misc/smssend port is already installed

[root@pbsd /var/db/pkg]# pkg_info -L smssend-3.5 | grep /usr/local/bin
/usr/local/bin/bestsms.sh
/usr/local/bin/email2smssend
/usr/local/bin/smssend

Trying to install from port the comm/smstools3

[root@pbsd /usr/ports/comms/smstools3]# make install clean
===>  Installing for smstools-3.1.3
===>   smstools-3.1.3 depends on shared library: mm - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if comms/smstools3 already installed
pkg_info: the package info for package 'tbz' is corrupt
./install.sh /usr/local/bin

Installing binary program files
  /usr/local/bin/smsd
Installing config file
  /usr/local/etc/smsd.conf
Creating minimum spool directories
  Skipped /var/spool, directory already exists
  Skipped /var/spool/sms, directory already exists
  Skipped /var/spool/sms/incoming, directory already exists
  Skipped /var/spool/sms/outgoing, directory already exists
  Skipped /var/spool/sms/checked, directory already exists

Example script files are not installed automatically.
Please dont forget to edit /usr/local/etc/smsd.conf.
ln: /usr/local/bin/sendsms: File exists
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/comms/smstools3.

How-To-Repeat: try to install mics/smssend and comm/smstools3 from the port
